    Returns the total number of relationships/edges in the graph.

    Entity - Class in models
    Base abstract class for all domain entities
    Entity(String, String) - Constructor for class models.Entity
    Constructs a new Entity.
    extractArtistContentSubgraph() - Method in class services.GraphService
    Extracts a subgraph containing only Artists, Content items, and their participation relationships.
    extractGenreSubgraph(String) - Method in class services.GraphService
    Extracts a subgraph containing only content of a given genre.
    extractGenreUserSubgraph(String) - Method in class services.GraphService
    Extracts a subgraph containing only users, content of a given genre, and their watch/rate relationships.
    extractRatingSubgraph(double) - Method in class services.GraphService
    Extracts a subgraph with rating relationships above a minimum threshold.
    extractRegionSubgraph(String) - Method in class services.GraphService
    Extracts a subgraph containing only users of a given region and their watched/rated content.
    extractUserArtistSubgraph() - Method in class services.GraphService
    Extracts a subgraph containing Users, Artists, and their related Content items.
    extractUserUserSubgraph() - Method in class services.GraphService
    Extracts a subgraph containing only Users and their follow relationships.

    findArtistsByBirthDateRange(String, String) - Method in class services.SearchEngine
    Finds artists born within a specific date range.
    findArtistsByGender(String) - Method in class services.SearchEngine
    Finds artists by gender.
    findArtistsByNameAndNationalityAndGenderAndBirthDate(String, String, String, String, String) - Method in class services.SearchEngine
    Finds artists by name substring, nationality, gender, and birth date range.
    findArtistsByNameSubstring(String) - Method in class services.SearchEngine
    Finds artists by name substring.
    findArtistsByNationality(String) - Method in class services.SearchEngine
    Finds artists by their nationality using Hash Table.
    findArtistsByNationalityAndGenderAndBirthDateRange(String, String, String, String) - Method in class services.SearchEngine
    Finds artists by nationality, gender, and birth date range.
    findContentsByGenreAndDurationRange(String, int, int) - Method in class services.SearchEngine
    Finds contents of a specific genre with duration within a given range.
    findContentsByNamePrefix(String) - Method in class services.SearchEngine
    Performs a prefix search on content names using Lexicographical BST bounds.
    findContentsByReleaseDateRange(String, String) - Method in class services.SearchEngine
    Finds content released within a specific date range.
    findContentsByTitleAndTypeAndGenreAndDate(String, ContentType, String, String, String) - Method in class services.SearchEngine
    Finds contents by title substring, type, genre, and release date range.
    findContentsByTitleSubstring(String) - Method in class services.SearchEngine
    Finds contents by title substring.
    findContentsByType(ContentType) - Method in class services.SearchEngine
    Finds contents by type.
    findContentsByTypeAndGenreAndDateRange(ContentType, String, String, String) - Method in class services.SearchEngine
    Finds contents by type, genre, and release date range.
    findContentsByYearRange(int, int) - Method in class services.SearchEngine
    Finds contents released within a year range.
    findFollowersWhoWatchedSameFilm(String, String, String, String) - Method in class services.GraphService
    Determines which followers of a user watched a given film in a given time interval.
    findUsersByNameAndRegionAndDate(String, String, String, String) - Method in class services.SearchEngine
    Finds users by name substring, region, and registration date range.
    findUsersByNameSubstring(String) - Method in class services.SearchEngine
    Finds users by a name substring.
    findUsersByRegion(String) - Method in class services.SearchEngine
    Finds all users from a given region.
    findUsersByRegionAndDateRange(String, String, String) - Method in class services.SearchEngine
    Finds all users from a given region and registration date range.
    findUsersByRegistrationDateRange(String, String) - Method in class services.SearchEngine
    Finds users registered within a specific date range.
    findUsersWithHighWatchTime(String, String, String) - Method in class services.GraphService
    Finds users who watched series of a specific genre within a given time interval.

    loadArtists(String, StreamingDatabase) - Static method in class database.FileManager
    Loads artists from a text file.
    loadContents(String, StreamingDatabase) - Static method in class database.FileManager
    Loads media content,linking artists and generating genres.
    loadGenres(String, StreamingDatabase) - Static method in class database.FileManager
    Loads genre definitions into the system.
    loadSystem(StreamingDatabase, String) - Static method in class database.FileManager
    Restores application states from a binary file, resolving and re-linking object reference paths to secure data topology across internal collections.
    loadUsers(String, StreamingDatabase) - Static method in class database.FileManager
    Loads users from into the database.

    rebuildIndexes(StreamingDatabase) - Method in class services.SearchEngine
    Fully rebuilds all indexes from the current database state.

    Removes an artist from the database.

    Removes a content from the database.

    Removes a genre from the database.
    removeUser(String) - Method in class database.StreamingDatabase
    Removes a user from the database.
    removeUser(User) - Method in class services.SearchEngine
    Removes a user from all search indexes.
    removeVertex(String) - Method in class database.StreamingGraph
    Removes a vertex and all its connected incoming and outgoing edges.

    shortestPathBetweenArtists(String, String, StreamingGraph) - Method in class services.GraphService
    Calculates the shortest path between two artists based on content they both participated in.
    shortestPathUsersByFilm(String, String, boolean) - Method in class services.GraphService
    Finds the shortest path between two users based on shared movie contents watched.
    shortestPathUsersByFollow(String, String) - Method in class services.GraphService
    Finds the shortest path between two users using only FOLLOWS relationships.
    shortestPathUsersBySeries(String, String, boolean, String) - Method in class services.GraphService
    Finds the shortest path between two users based on shared series contents watched.

    V

    V() - Method in class database.StreamingGraph

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class models.ContentType
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
